top_signals.title: NATO defense push already strains Europe’s budgets
top_signals.summary: Under pressure from U.S. President Donald Trump, members of the 32-country military pact agreed at last year's summit to boost defense spending to 5% of GDP by 2035.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: BonkDAO loses $20 million following ‘malicious governance proposal’ attack
top_signals.summary: The funds have been tracked to crypto exchanges, and South Korea-based Upbit said it has suspended BONK deposits and withdrawals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Judge revives fraud claim against Barry Silbert, DCG in Genesis Yield lawsuit
top_signals.summary: The class action centers on Genesis Yield, a lending program that let customers deposit crypto in exchange for interest payments.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Hanwha Ocean Shares Sink After Losing Canada Sub Deal to Germany
top_signals.summary: Shares of Hanwha Ocean fell more than 20% on Tuesday morning after Canada picked a German bid to replace its aging submarine fleet over the South Korean shipbuilder’s proposal.

top_signals.title: Bitmine added another $74 million in ether as Tom Lee bets on Clarity Act boost
